articles.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed on Sunday as Tehran casts doubt on timing
articles.summary: The US president's comments come as Iran says an exact date has not been decided.

articles.title: Switzerland votes on plan to cap population at 10 million

articles.title: Author Chimamanda Adichie accuses hospital of stalling review into son's death

articles.title: Norway braces for verdict in rape trial of crown princess's son Høiby

articles.title: Armed men kidnap high-ranking security official in Haiti

articles.title: Trump's name removed from Kennedy Center after court order
